test.command: MILESTONE="misc-m3-followups"; if [ -n "${MILESTONE:-}" ]; then ./.factory/library/verify-flow-report-finalization.sh "$MILESTONE" || exit 1; fi; scripts/test-openburnbar-swift.sh || exit 1; scripts/test-openburnbar-app.sh || CI=true scripts/test-openburnbar-app.sh

typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: Cross-flow tests still use ContextPackService helpers directly and never drive the real DashboardView → SessionDetailView → ContextPackSheet harness required for CTXDETAIL/CTXCROSS.
The new parity coverage does not assert full ordered session-id equality between entrypoints, so mid-array ordering drift could still pass.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/user-testing.md to state that verify-flow-report-finalization.sh now resolves the built-in m1-context-pack-core default report mapping automatically.

rejectedObservations.observation: The XML-safety naming guidance is still split across validation-contract.md and .factory/library/user-testing.md.
rejectedObservations.reason: Already captured by the mission contract drift; repo-local guidance already points at the current test name and the contract file is outside the repository scope.

rejectedObservations.observation: The context-pack-ui-worker guidance already requires real view-surface coverage for CTXDETAIL/CTXCROSS.
rejectedObservations.reason: Duplicate of existing skill guidance; no additional AGENTS.md or skill update is needed.
